extDesc.message: Close duplicate tab on current window.

select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode.description: Screen-reader-only accessible name for the icon-badge-mode <select>. Not visible on screen. Screen readers announce this immediately before the currently selected option_updateBadgeMode_* text, so phrase it as a lead-in fragment that reads naturally when followed by that text. The corresponding select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_* string is exactly this text plus a space plus the matching option_updateBadgeMode_* text — keep all three in sync.

option_updateBadgeMode_none.description: Text of one <option> in the icon-badge-mode <select>. Read by everyone (sighted users when the native dropdown is open, and screen readers). Screen readers announce it right after select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode, so phrase it as a continuation of that lead-in fragment. select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_none must equal select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode + ' ' + this text exactly — keep them in sync.

option_updateBadgeMode_all.message: Show the total number of closable duplicate tabs
option_updateBadgeMode_all.description: Text of one <option> in the icon-badge-mode <select>. Read by everyone (sighted users when the native dropdown is open, and screen readers). Screen readers announce it right after select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode, so phrase it as a continuation of that lead-in fragment. select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_all must equal select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode + ' ' + this text exactly — keep them in sync.

option_updateBadgeMode_current.message: Show the number of duplicates of the current tab
option_updateBadgeMode_current.description: Text of one <option> in the icon-badge-mode <select>. Read by everyone (sighted users when the native dropdown is open, and screen readers). Screen readers announce it right after select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode, so phrase it as a continuation of that lead-in fragment. select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_current must equal select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode + ' ' + this text exactly — keep them in sync.

select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_non.message: On the icon: Don't show a duplicate count
select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_non.description: Sighted-users-only readout (aria-hidden, excluded from screen readers) of the icon-badge-mode <select>'s current value, shown without opening the dropdown. Must equal select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode + ' ' + option_updateBadgeMode_none exactly, so this text matches word-for-word what a screen reader announces for the same selection.

select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_all.message: On the icon: Show the total number of closable duplicate tabs
select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_all.description: Sighted-users-only readout (aria-hidden, excluded from screen readers) of the icon-badge-mode <select>'s current value, shown without opening the dropdown. Must equal select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode + ' ' + option_updateBadgeMode_all exactly, so this text matches word-for-word what a screen reader announces for the same selection.

select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_cur.message: On the icon: Show the number of duplicates of the current tab
select_visible_value_updateBadgeMode_cur.description: Sighted-users-only readout (aria-hidden, excluded from screen readers) of the icon-badge-mode <select>'s current value, shown without opening the dropdown. Must equal select_for_screen_reader_updateBadgeMode + ' ' + option_updateBadgeMode_current exactly, so this text matches word-for-word what a screen reader announces for the same selection.

hint_forcedChangeURLWhenClickedAnchorLin.message: When you click on intra-page links like the table of contents, the URL will be forcibly updated.

hint_autoAvoidDuplicate.message: When a new tab opens, if an existing tab with the same URL is already open, that existing tab is shown instead. New tab pages and some special URLs are excluded.

hint_useAdvancedPathRule.message: Configure the URL pattern considered a duplicate individually for each domain.
